issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page - contains no substantive macro catalyst data
Per Rule 8: navigation_page types must not be accepted
No economic projections, inflation figures, growth data, or catalyst information present
Archive value is too low - only provides access points to actual reports
No specific numerical evidence or analytical content
human_review_reason: The record correctly identifies this as a non-archivable container page. Rule 8 mandate is unambiguous - navigation pages must be rejected regardless of content quality. No human judgment needed.

corrected_fields.summary: This is a container/listing page for ECB Economic Bulletins, not a specific analytical document. The page describes what the Economic Bulletin is (policy decision basis, released eight times yearly) and lists previous release dates. No actual economic data, projections, inflation figures, growth analysis, or macro catalyst information is contained in this source.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This is a meta-page about ECB publications rather than an actual economic report. It does not contain data suitable for macro catalyst analysis. Per Rule 8, navigation/listing pages must be rejected.
